steps.t: Ravaedron has asked to meet you at Fernbrake Cot, where he will give the painting to his friends.
Maddoc Stagshorn stands outside his home, contemplating the gift.
Ravaedron is at Fernbrake Cot, beaming with happiness.
Ravaedron encountered the Ranger Idhrien on his way to Fernbrake Cot, and he thinks you should aid her if you can.
The Ranger Idhrien suggested that you could help her gather some of the wild herbs she needs for making poultices and other healing remedies for the D…
The Ranger Idhrien suggested that you could help her gather some of the wild herbs she needs for making poultices and other healing remedies for the D…
Gathering the herbs has brought you quite near to Ravaedron. He will be pleased to bring the fruit of your labours to Idhrien.
Ravaedron has seen something by the side of the cottage that has quite disturbed him.
Ravaedron stands by the cottage of his friends, hurt by their dismissal of his gift.
